summary: P0 Media Protection Hardening Bug Fix - Full testing complete. All 30 backend tests passed (16 unit tests + 14 API integration tests). Frontend UI verified: thumbnail uses secure media proxy URL, no raw static URLs in DOM. The URL prefix inconsistency bug is FIXED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Media Protection Hardening fully tested. Bug fix verified: _is_protected_asset_url() and _normalize_asset_url() functions now handle both /api/static/generated/viral_* and /static/generated/viral_* URL prefixes. All file-based assets (thumbnail, video, voiceover, zip_bundle) return secure_url via media proxy, NEVER file_url. Text assets (hooks, script, captions) have content but no file_url. Direct static access to viral content returns 403. Media proxy streaming works with valid tokens, rejects malformed/expired tokens. Public share teaser returns thumbnail_url as secure proxy URL.

url_prefix_fix.bug_description: DB records stored URLs as /static/generated/viral_* (without /api/ prefix) causing silent data loss
url_prefix_fix.fix_description: Added _is_protected_asset_url() and _normalize_asset_url() functions that handle both prefix formats

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/viral-ideas/jobs/{job_id}/asset: PASS - file assets have secure_url, no file_url
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/viral-ideas/share/{job_id}: PASS - thumbnail_url is secure proxy URL

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: DB records with /static/generated/viral_* URLs got NEITHER secure_url NOR file_url (silent data loss)
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - all 16 unit tests pass, all 14 API tests pass

skipped_tests.test_bug_case_job_assets_have_secure_url: Skipped - bug case job ID 02453db5-f401-4bb2-945c-cf0dacf54539 not accessible (may belong to different user or not exist)
